Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Phoenix dbt Meetup
3 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

Slalom Consulting

7150 E Camelback Rd #200 · Scottsdale, AZ

Report Ad
Mastering Data Governance with dbt: Join Phoenix User Group Meetup

Hosted by Nidhi K.

Phoenix dbt Meetup
3 reviews
Details

## Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as data governance, analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: Slalom Consulting @ 7150 E Camelback Rd suite 200 · Scottsdale, AZ
🤝Organizer: Slalom Consulting and dbt Labs
🍕Catering: Light bites and drinks
To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation:https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy
📝Agenda

4:00 - 4:25 | Check in
4:25 - 4:30 | Welcome Remarks
4:30 - 5:10 | Presentations with Kyle Marshall (Senior Staff Data Engineer @ Shopify)
5:00 - 5:45 | Open Forum
5:45 - 6:00 | Closing Remarks

EVENT DETAILS:
The doors open at 4pm. Presentations begin at 4:30pm. Food and refreshments will be provided.
* If you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."
➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-arizona channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 30,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Kyle Marshall

Kyle is a data enthusiast who loves finding new ways to bring value to data. He is currently a Data Engineer at Shopify where he leads a team supporting the data warehouse platform, using dbt.

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Alex Welch, Head of Data @dbt Labs
Topic: BI Tools & Semantic Layer
When: June 27 @ 4pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Whether you’re looking at flight data, sales figures, consumer transactions, or biometric stats — access to the correct sources + a well-trained user + BI tools + dbt = data that works!!
This month we have Alex Welch, Head of Data at dbt Labs, to answer questions and discuss more about BI tools, analytics trends & the Semantic Layer!

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-merge channel in Slack to participate live!

Report Ad
Unlock the Power of Data Transformation: Join Phoenix dbt Meetup![in-person]

Hosted by Nidhi K. and Will D.

Phoenix dbt Meetup
3 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data! Talks predominantly focus on community members' experience with dbt, however, you'll catch presentations on broader topics such as analytics engineering, data stacks, data ops, modeling, testing, and team structures.

🏠Venue Host: Slalom Consulting @ 7150 E Camelback Rd suite 200 · Scottsdale, AZ
🤝Organizer: Slalom Consulting and dbt Labs
🍕Catering: Light bites and drinks

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://bit.ly/4azcreT

📝Agenda

4:00 - 4:25 | Check in
4:25 - 4:30 | Welcome Remarks
4:30 - 5:00 | Presentations with Nick Handel, Director of Product at dbt Labs (ex-CEO & Co-Founder of Transform, and formerly at Airbnb and Blackrock)
5:00 - 5:45 | Open Forum
5:45 - 6:00 | Closing Remarks

EVENT DETAILS:
The doors open at 4pm. Presentations begin at 4:30pm. Food and refreshments will be provided.

* If you need to cancel last minute or change your RSVP status on the Meetup to "Not Going."

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/
🤝For the best Meetup experience, make sure to join the #local-arizona channel in dbt Slack (https://slack.getdbt.com/).
----------------------------------
dbt allows teams to ship trusted data products, faster. dbt is a data transformation framework that lets analysts and engineers collaborate using their shared knowledge of SQL. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust.

Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more
Speaker
Nick Handel

Nick Handel is a Director of Product working on dbt’s Semantic Layer. Previously he was the CEO and Co-Founder at Transform, a company acquired by dbt, and the Product Leader for MetricFlow. Before Transform, Nick held a variety of roles at Branch International (Head of Data), Airbnb (Product Manager, Sr. Data Scientist), and Blackrock (Research Economist). At Airbnb, his work included supporting the adoption of Airbnb’s metrics repository, launching Airbnb’s ML platform, leading growth strategies, and building the company’s data science team. He’s an avid trail runner, climber, skier, and adventurer and spends much of his free time with his dog Huckleberry.
